---
title: "Akshay Shankar"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/profile.png
  links:
    - icon: google-scholar
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=8XmbbYgAAAAJ
    - icon: orcid
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0009-9521-1188
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/20akshay00
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/20akshay00
---

Hi! I'm Akshay, a third-year PhD student at [QuantumGroup@UGent](https://quantumghent.github.io/) with an interest in the exotic physics of Bose-Einstein condensates and programming. I am currently working on utilizing Tensor Network techniques to study BEC systems in the context of quantum simulation experiments. When I'm not performing research, I enjoy [making games](https://20akshay00.itch.io/) with the [Godot engine](https://godotengine.org/).
